body:
Elena,

You closed your Series B funding in February and currently have 11 open engineering roles, including three AI-adjacent positions. Companies in this stage often find recruiting capacity more limiting than budget.

Tenacious runs dedicated engineering squads with senior Python and data engineers ready to embed in your stack, helping scale your team faster than in-house hiring alone.

Would you be open to a 30-minute discovery call next Tuesday or Wednesday to explore if this could fit your needs? 1 Cal.com link

Elena
Research Partner, Tenacious Intelligence Corporation
gettenacious.com
subject: Context: your $14M Series B and the Python team
